note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.flowplane.vertex module functions.

methods.name: aperture_hydraulic
methods.description: Get the hydraulic aperture limited by specified maximum (flowplane property aperture-maximum).

methods.name: aperture_mech
methods.description: Get the mechanical aperture.

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the lumped area to the vertex.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the flowplane vertex extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: flowplane
methods.description: Get the flowplane associated with a given flow plane vertex.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the flowplane vertex group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: vertex.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the flowplane vertex. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this flowplane vertex is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the flowplane vertex id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: vertex.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the flowplane vertex is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the index (offset) of the flow plane vertex.

methods.name: knot
methods.description: Get the flow knot associated with a given flow plane vertex.

methods.name: local1
methods.description: Get the local x-coordinate of a flow plane vertex.

methods.name: local2
methods.description: Get the local x-coordinate of a flow plane vertex.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the flowplane vertex flowplane vertex position (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the flowplane vertex flowplane vertex position.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the flowplane vertex flowplane vertex position.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the flowplane vertex flowplane vertex position.

methods.name: prop
methods.description: Get a flow plane property.

methods.name: proppant_mconc
methods.description: Get the mass concentration of proppant of a flow plane vertex.

methods.name: proppant_thick
methods.description: Get the proppant thickness of a flow plane vertex (volume concentration times aperture).

methods.name: proppant_vconc
methods.description: Get the proppant volume concentration.

methods.name: set_aperture_mech
methods.description: Set the mechanical aperture.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the flowplane vertex extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: vertex.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the flowplane vertex group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_prop
methods.description: Set a flow plane property.

methods.name: subcontact1
methods.description: Get one of the sub-contacts of face-to-face contact used for interpolation.

methods.name: subcontact2
methods.description: Get one of the sub-contacts of face-to-face contact used for interpolation.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this flowplane vertex is live.

methods.name: visc
methods.description: Get the viscosity of fluid at the vertex (viscosity will increase from the global value if the proppant concentration is greater than 0).

methods.name: weight1
methods.description: Get the interpolation weight associated with subcontact 1 for a flow plane vertex.

methods.name: weight2
methods.description: Get the interpolation weight associated with subcontact 2 for a flow plane vertex.
